review_text: Enjoyed the Fresh Lime Soda! Fresh Lime Soda was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!
Outstanding experience! The Butter Chicken  Naan  Samosa (2 pcs)  and Dal Makhani exceeded all expectations. Samosa (2 pcs) was the star of the meal. Will definitely order again!
Best Indian food in UAE! Garlic Naan  Paneer Butter Masala  and Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) were incredible. Garlic Naan had the perfect balance of spices. Five stars!
Decent food but nothing special. Fish Curry and Chicken Tikka Masala were okay. Chicken Tikka Masala lacked the punch I expected.
Hands down the best Fresh Lime Soda I've ever had! Fresh Lime Soda and Chicken Seekh Kebab were all prepared beautifully. Fresh and flavorful!
Wow! Just wow! Rasmalai (2 pcs)  Naan  and Sweet Lassi were all fantastic. Rasmalai (2 pcs) was particularly memorable. Can't wait to order again!
Average experience. Sweet Lassi and Mango Lassi were fine but Sweet Lassi was a bit bland. Room for improvement.
Absolutely amazing Tandoori Roti! The Tandoori Roti was cooked to perfection. Fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Highly recommend!
Outstanding experience! The Paneer Butter Masala exceeded all expectations. Paneer Butter Masala was the star of the meal. Will definitely order again!
Wow! Just wow! Butter Naan  Garlic Naan  Tandoori Roti  and Fresh Lime Soda were all fantastic. Tandoori Roti was particularly memorable. Can't wait to order again!
Expected better. Paneer Butter Masala  Masala Chai  Rasmalai (2 pcs)  Paneer Tikka  and Malai Kofta were subpar. Paneer Tikka was too oily and greasy. Stomach upset followed.
Mixed feelings. Fish Curry  Butter Naan  Vegetable Biryani  Lamb Rogan Josh  and Dal Makhani were acceptable. Fish Curry was decent but portion was small for the price.
Exceptional quality! Ordered Palak Paneer  Kulfi  Lamb Rogan Josh  and Paneer Tikka and everything was delicious. The Palak Paneer melted in my mouth. Perfect!
Wow! Just wow! Lamb Rogan Josh  Kulfi  Chicken Biryani  Aloo Tikki Chaat  and Butter Chicken were all fantastic. Lamb Rogan Josh was particularly memorable. Can't wait to order again!
Not bad  not great. Aloo Tikki Chaat were edible. Aloo Tikki Chaat needed more seasoning.
Mixed feelings. Fresh Lime Soda and Samosa (2 pcs) were acceptable. Fresh Lime Soda was decent but portion was small for the price.
Enjoyed the Kulfi and Chicken Seekh Kebab! Kulfi was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!
Very satisfied! Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) were fresh and flavorful. Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) was the standout dish.
Perfect in every way! Fish Curry  Chicken Seekh Kebab  Butter Naan  and Dal Makhani were all excellent. Fish Curry stood out with its rich  authentic taste.
Very satisfied! Paneer Butter Masala and Samosa (2 pcs) were fresh and flavorful. Paneer Butter Masala was the standout dish.

Absolutely amazing Chicken Tikka Masala  Butter Chicken  and Aloo Tikki Chaat! The Aloo Tikki Chaat was cooked to perfection. Fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Highly recommend!
